title: Error Handling & Recovery Loops
learning_outcomes: Explain exception capturing in tool execution loops.

content_sections.title: Tool Exception Capture and Injection
content_sections.content: In autonomous pipelines, runtime errors must be handled gracefully. When a tool throws an exception, the system catches the error, formats the traceback, and returns it to the model as an 'Observation'. This provides the model with the error context, allowing it to generate a correction (e.g. correcting a syntax error in an SQL query) in the next iteration.
